name: yorklanes
description: YorkPath student dashboard (York University course planning)

scripts.start:dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/web"
scripts.start:prod: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build:prod -w apps/web && cross-env NODE_ENV=production concurrently -n api,web -c blue,magenta "npm run start -w apps/api" "npm run start -w apps/web"
scripts.check: npm run build -w apps/api && npm run check -w apps/web
scripts.build: npm run build -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.build:prod: npm run build:prod -w apps/web && npm run build -w apps/api
scripts.scraper:yoki: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py yoki --subject eecs --out output/eecs.json
scripts.scraper:yoki:batch: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py yoki-batch --out output/catalogue.json
scripts.scraper:db: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py db --input output/fixture_courses.json
scripts.scraper:import: npm run scraper:fixture && npm run scraper:db
scripts.scraper:schedule: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py schedule --subject eecs --out output/sections.json
scripts.scraper:schedule:all: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py schedule --subject eecs --all-terms --out output/sections.json
scripts.scraper:schedule:fixture: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py schedule-fixture --out output/sections.json
scripts.scraper:schedule:db: cd services/scraper && python scrape_courses.py db --kind sections --input output/sections.json
